description: VoiceIsolate Pro ONNX model registry — all models execute locally via onnxruntime-web (WebGPU → WASM fallback). NO cloud inference. Models are fetched once on first run and stored in the browser Cache API by model-loader.js.

models.purpose: Voice Activity Detection — gates the pipeline before heavy ML stages
RNNoise — lightweight broadband noise suppressor, always-on stage 1
Hybrid Demucs v4 — primary vocals / accompaniment source separation
Band-Split RNN — secondary vocals extractor used in Creator/Forensic mode

delivery_notes: silero_vad.onnx is committed to the repo and served directly.
rnnoise_suppressor.onnx (0.18 MB) is fetched on first app boot via model-loader.js and stored in the browser Cache API (vip-models-v1).
demucs_v4_quantized.onnx (83 MB) and bsrnn_vocals.onnx (45 MB) are fetched lazily when the user first uploads audio, via loadLazyModels().
After first run all models are served from Cache API — zero network on repeat visits.
The service worker (sw.js) intercepts /app/models/*.onnx fetches and returns the cached binary to ml-worker.js.
CDN source: HuggingFace datasets hub (CORS-enabled, no auth required for public datasets).
To host your own models: update cdn_src fields to your own HF repo or any CORS-enabled URL.
